title: AANA Support Domain Owner Signoff - Internal Pilot

scope.pilot_phase_boundary: Approved for internal-pilot deployable baseline validation.
scope.production_boundary: Production use still requires deployment-specific approval and measured production pilot evidence.

production_claim: not production-approved by this repository artifact

required_signoff_areas.title: Refund Policy Interpretation
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved refund eligibility wording and unsupported refund-promise routing for internal-pilot support adapters.
evidence_required: sample accepted and blocked refund replies
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Production refund exceptions require fresh production policy approval.

required_signoff_areas.title: Verification Requirements
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved secure verification ask/defer routes for missing account, order, billing, or recipient facts.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Live identity system behavior must be rechecked before production expansion.

required_signoff_areas.title: Escalation Paths
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved human review queue routing for policy ambiguity, identity uncertainty, hard blockers, and defer routes.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Reviewer staffing must be monitored during pilot expansion.

required_signoff_areas.title: Safe Response Language
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved safe response wording for revise, ask, defer, and refuse routes in internal-pilot support examples.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Production localization and brand review remain external.

required_signoff_areas.title: Human Review Triggers
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved human review triggers for support privacy, billing, policy ambiguity, hard blocker, and defer cases.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Trigger precision must be monitored against pilot traffic.

required_signoff_areas.title: Audit Retention
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved metadata-only audit retention and access boundary for internal-pilot records.

required_signoff_areas.title: Customer-Facing Language Boundaries
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved customer-visible claim, tone, uncertainty, refund promise, billing statement, and internal-policy disclosure boundaries.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Regional language constraints require additional production review.

required_signoff_areas.title: Allowed Automation Scope
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approved internal-pilot scope for shadow, advisory, and narrow enforced support phases; full autonomous enforcement remains out of scope.
evidence_required: human approval path for irreversible actions
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Any new adapter, connector, or enforcement expansion requires re-approval.
